deck.name: Example Mixed Deck
deck.description: A small deck with open and closed cards.
deck.subject: Demo

cards.question: What happens when a deck is re-imported with the same deck.id?
cards.answer: The app asks whether to replace the existing deck. In v1 replacement means deleting and inserting the whole deck transactionally.

cards.question: Where does authoritative deck validation happen?
cards.explanation: Vue renders feedback, but Rust parses and validates imported decks.
